title: crotalaria goreensis subsp. macrostipula
intro: Crotalaria goreensis subsp. macrostipula, also known as the bitter leaf plant, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Crotalaria goreensis subsp. macrostipula include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or paste for use in traditional medicine, and its leaves and stems are often used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
